design_principle: Every offer is 3 sentences, no backlink ask, no anchor request, exact value proposition, low-friction CTA. Designed for resource pages, broken link replacement, and roundup submissions — not cold blogger outreach.

offers.name: Free embeddable calculator for your resource page
offers.use_for: Resource pages, tool directories, library guides, .edu financial literacy pages
offers.email_3_sentences: I noticed your [resource page name] at [URL] lists financial tools for [audience]. I have a free [calculator type] your visitors can use directly on the page — no signup, no data collection, just a clean interactive tool that works on any device. Want me to send the one-line embed code?
offers.exact_value: Free interactive calculator to improve their resource page — reduces their maintenance burden
offers.low_friction_cta: Want me to send the one-line embed code?
offers.privacy_note: No signup, no data collection — all calculations client-side

offers.name: Replace broken/outdated calculator
offers.use_for: Pages with broken calculator links, outdated Flash tools, non-mobile calculators
offers.email_3_sentences: Your [page name] at [URL] links to a [broken/outdated] [calculator type]. I have an updated, mobile-friendly version that does the same thing and actually works — no signup, no ads, just a clean replacement your readers can use. Would you like the updated link?
offers.exact_value: Fix a broken page with zero effort on their part — site owners hate broken links
offers.low_friction_cta: Would you like the updated link?

offers.name: Custom example for your content
offers.use_for: Bloggers, newsletter writers, journalists who have articles with calculations
offers.email_3_sentences: I read your [article about specific topic with calculations]. I can create a custom interactive version where your readers plug in their own numbers and see personalized results — same math, but actually usable. No cost, no catch — happy to build it for your article.
offers.exact_value: Custom interactive tool built specifically for THEIR content — highest value offer
offers.low_friction_cta: Would that be useful for the article?
